[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up, stylized 3D cartoon scene of a man with two small children in an indoor room, with large overlaid text at the top and center.

Main Subject:
A stylized 3D animated-looking man is shown from the chest up, facing forward toward the camera. He has short dark hair, thick dark eyebrows, closed-lip facial features, and a slightly smiling expression. Behind him, two small child-like figures stand near his shoulders: one on the left with short dark hair and a green top, and one on the right with a white top and dark hair, both facing forward.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors under a light-colored ceiling with visible structural lines. Behind the people, there are shelves with books or items, bright colored walls, and a large window with vertical frames. Lighting looks like indoor daylight or evenly lit artificial light.

Visual Details:
The man’s face dominates the frame with smooth shading and bold dark outlines typical of a low-detail 3D cartoon style. The children are smaller and less detailed, positioned left and right behind him. The color palette includes teal/blue tones in the background wall and ceiling area, green shelving, and warm yellow lighting on the right side near the window. The camera angle is a front-facing, close-up perspective.

Visible Text:
GW tandain lu
Anjing

Practical Summary:
A stylized 3D cartoon man is centered in the frame with two small children behind him inside a colorful room. Large text overlays read “GW tandain lu” at the top and “Anjing” across the lower middle.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
